eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ogle, IL; at 03:38 PM ON APR 15, 2026 Effective until 04:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Tornado Warning has been issued for Ogle County. Please seek shelter in the lowest level of your home, away from windows. Please do not call 9-1-1 unless an immediate emergency. For power outages, contact ComEd or RMU Please seek shelter in the lowest level of your home, away from windows. For power outages, contact ComEd or RMU.
